mapper.select: select o.id , o.created_time ,o.sum, oi.amount,oi.goods_id from `order` o left join order_info oi on o.id = oi.order_id
select sum(amount) from order_info oi where goods_id= #{id} and order_id= #{OrderId}
select o.id,o.created_time,o.sum from `order` o where o.created_time between #{BeginWeek} and DATE_ADD(#{EndWeek},INTERVAL 1 DAY)
select o.id , o.created_time ,o.sum, oi.amount,oi.goods_id from `order` o left join order_info oi on o.id=oi.order_id where o.created_time between #{BeginTime} and DATE_ADD(#{EndTime},INTERVAL 1 DAY)
